title: License request failed due to self-signed certificate
symptom: When attempting to register for the community edition license, n8n returns an error stating 'self-signed certificate in certificate chain'. This prevents successful license activation.
not_this_if: Using valid SSL certificates from a trusted CA
root_cause: n8n's license server does not trust self-signed certificates by default. This leads to failures in license requests when the server cannot validate the certificate chain.
fix_steps: Start n8n in tunnel mode to bypass certificate validation issues.
Request the community edition license while in tunnel mode.
Apply the license in the settings.
agent_instruction: Start n8n in tunnel mode, request the license, then restart without tunneling.
